title: New Plugins on the Cursor Marketplace
description: Added more than 30 new plugins from major partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale. Cursor can now read from, write to, and take actions across more of your stack.

title: Cursor Automations - Always-On Cloud Agents
description: Automations feature launched, enabling always-on agents that run based on triggers and instructions defined by users. Agents can be triggered by events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks, with access to MCPs and memory tools for learning from past runs.

community_feedback.quote: Users reported early issues with automations not triggering correctly from bot comments on pull requests
The feature is being used for code review, incident response, and automating engineering workflows
Cursor Automations can scale code review and operations as background tasks for teams

title: Cascade and MCP Improvements (v1.9577.24)
description: Fixed dangling Diff Zones related to Jupyter Notebooks, improved Jupyter Notebook performance on WSL, enhanced Cascade UI rendering performance, added support for loading SKILL.md files, and improved context management for MCP servers.

community_feedback.quote: Windsurf performed better with medium-to-large codebases according to Reddit's ChatGPTCoding community

title: Codex CLI 0.107.0 Release
description: Improved approval prompts and app connection sign-in flows, along with additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

title: Devin 2.2 - Major Platform Update
description: Major update described as 'one of the biggest updates to Devin since launch' and 'a full rebuild.' The update includes significant performance improvements - 2x faster and 12% better on Junior Developer Evals, rebuilt for Claude Sonnet 4.5.

community_feedback.quote: The biggest update they've done... a full rebuild rather than just a small tweak
Devin 2.2 is now 2x faster and 12% better on Junior Developer Evals
